title: Minimize GF(2) Multiplications for a GF(2^k) Field Multiplier
strategies: schoolbook: k*k partial products a_i&b_j, XOR-accumulate, reduce mod f (baseline)
one-level Karatsuba: 3 half-size products instead of 4
recursive Karatsuba down to a tuned base case, best-of several bases
manual bilinear identities / interpolation to push the multiplication count below Karatsuba
